name: Xbox 360 Controller (Wired)
notes: Xbox 360 descriptor with separate Z/Rz triggers (6 HID axes). WGI always reads HID for triggers — combined Z would give B6==B7 in browser. Real 360 has 5 DI axes via xusb22.sys (no HID), but UMDF2 virtual devices must use HID. Separate triggers match Xbox One BT approach (Microsoft's own solution). 10 buttons, hat switch.
